title: MedlinePlus: Medical Tests
content: Medical Tests Learn about medical tests, including what the tests are used for, why a doctor may order a test, how a test will feel, and what the results may mean.Â Medical tests can help detect a condition, determine a diagnosis, plan treatment, check to see if treatment is working, or monitor the condition over time . A doctor may order these tests as part of a routine checkup, to check for certain diseases and disorders, or to monitor your health.
